title: malpighia galeottiana
intro: Malpighia galeottiana, also known as the Mexican strawberry tree or wild strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that produces edible red fruits, rich in vitamins and minerals, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. The plant's leaves, stems, and fruits exhibit medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to various health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Malpighia galeottiana is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical and cosmetic products.
